series_metadata.series_description: File contains minutes from the Safety Inspector Advisory Board meetings. These meetings take place within a 4 to 6 week period.

retention_rules.disposition: Microform: Transfer microfilm to archives ; Paper: Retain advisory meeting minutes until records are superseded by new information or until records are no longer created in this agency, then microfilm. After microfilm has been checked for quality and completeness, destroy hard copy records, Microform: Archives ; Paper: Shred
